title: It Will Never Happen Again
writer: Sholom Aleichem, Rachel Auerbach, Bronislaw Brok
actors: Shimen Dzigan, Ysrael Szumacher, Niusia Gold
plot: In this, Poland's last Yiddish feature film, comedy duo Dzigan and Shumacher play all the parts in a Sholem Aleichem story staged for an audience of children who survived the Holocaust.
